This is a collection of our raw research notes. Each post is generated from a [Jupyter Notebook](https://jupyter.org/) that can be found in our GitHub [Research](https://github.com/OALabs/research/tree/master/_notebooks) repository. Notes may contain errors, spelling mistakes, grammar mistakes, and incorrect code. Please keep in mind these are all rough drafts. Pull requests are welcome!
